title: The Blood Mimicer Rebirth
description: A remake of the blood mimicer mod, new model, logic  and lore
body:
What is this mod?

This mod add a entity, stalking and watching you, he shaped like a human, but tall and there is a BLOOD on his face, he goal is kill you, 
Sometimes he is invisible and also has ghosts that watch you,
They are very weak and disappear when you approach. But he himself is more dangerous than you can imagine

What's add?

it's add 2 entities to the game, the blood mimicer and the ghost, also add some structure to your world


THIS MOD LOAD JUMPSCARES

YOU NEED TO INSTALL GECKOLIB MOD TO PLAY THE MOD 

THIS MOD CAN OPEN TXT FILE

THIS MOD CAN CHOW POPUP MASSEGE

THIS MOD CAN SHOW YOUR PC USERNAME

THIS MOD IS SAFE

This mod is remaking of the blood mimicer mod (old)
